creator: doug@freebsd.con.com
text:
Hello!

I'm hoping to get the consulting entry for the Aaronsen Group either added (i.e. to https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult_bycat/ in the "North America" section) or revised (on https://people.freebsd.org/~cawimm/consulting.html) with the current info:

    Aaronsen Group, Ltd.
    https://aaronsengroup.com/freebsd/

Is there anything I should do to help make this happen?

Thanks,

Doug
